section.heading: Savings clause
section.chapeau: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to affect the authority of the Secretary of Transportation that may exist prior to August 8, 2005, with respect to—

paragraph.content: research into, and regulation of, hydrogen-powered vehicles fuel systems integrity, standards, and safety under subtitle VI of title 49;
regulation of hazardous materials transportation under chapter 51 of title 49;
regulation of pipeline safety under chapter 601 of title 49;
encouragement and promotion of research, development, and deployment activities relating to advanced vehicle technologies under section 5506 11 See References in Text note below. of title 49;
regulation of motor vehicle safety under chapter 301 of title 49;
automobile fuel economy under chapter 329 of title 49; or
representation of the interests of the United States with respect to the activities and programs under the authority of title 49.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 109–58, title VIII, § 821, formerly § 816, Aug. 8, 2005, 119 Stat. 855; renumbered § 821, Pub. L. 117–58, div. D, title III, § 40314(1), Nov. 15, 2021, 135 Stat. 1008.)

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 5506 of title 49, referred to in par. (4), was repealed by Pub. L. 112–141, div. E, title II, § 52010(a), July 6, 2012, 126 Stat. 887.
